name: autonomous-engineer
description: Autonomous engineering team for Claude Code. 13 specialist subagents (Engineering Director, Technical Lead, Solutions Architect, QA Engineer/Comms/Env-Manager, Software Engineer, Product Engineer, Code/Security/Performance/Architecture reviewers, Engineering Manager), 10 slash commands (/ticket, /bug, /feature, /review, /qa, /pr, /status, /resume, /setup, /log), and 10 skills covering the six workflow patterns, bug & feature pipelines, ticket and PR protocols, multi-tenant validation, MCP setup, run logging, and progress reporting. Takes a ticket from intake to Pull Request.
